transcription.text: Hey Co-Pilot. Hey Co-Pilot. Hey Co-Pilot. Show me how to sync my holiday lights to my music. Let's walk through it together. Hey Co-Pilot. Why are we so far behind? Toy assembly has declined due to hot cocoa consumption. Are you talking to your computer? Help me figure out these instructions. Convert this recipe on my screen so it feeds 12. 14. Can you read the HOA guidelines and make sure I'm not breaking any rules? Adjust the inflatable reindeer so it's not crossing into the neighbor's yard. Any wiggle room on the reindeer? I really like the reindeer.

metadata.title: 2025 Microsoft Copilot Holidays: Meet the Computer You Can Talk To
